description: Offline golden research-evaluation fixture for deterministic regression testing. Each case includes stable expected insights, expected citations, and trusted source evidence used by local test infrastructure.

cases.query: Summarize why CRISPR-Cas9 experiments need off-target analysis.
expected_insights: CRISPR-Cas9 can cut genomic sites that partially match the guide RNA.
Off-target analysis helps separate intended edits from unintended genomic changes.

trusted_sources.title: CRISPR-Cas9 Off-Target Activity
trusted_sources.snippet: Review evidence on guide RNA specificity and genome-wide off-target detection.
supported_claims: CRISPR-Cas9 can cut genomic sites that partially match the guide RNA.
Off-target analysis helps separate intended edits from unintended genomic changes.

cases.query: Explain the role of attention in transformer language models.
expected_insights: Self-attention lets each token condition on other tokens in the same sequence.
Transformer models replace recurrent sequence processing with stacked attention and feed-forward layers.

trusted_sources.title: Attention Is All You Need
trusted_sources.snippet: The transformer architecture relies on self-attention mechanisms instead of recurrence.
supported_claims: Self-attention lets each token condition on other tokens in the same sequence.
Transformer models replace recurrent sequence processing with stacked attention and feed-forward layers.

cases.query: Describe why randomized controlled trials support causal inference.
expected_insights: Random assignment reduces systematic baseline differences between treatment groups.

trusted_sources.snippet: Randomized controlled trials compare outcomes after random allocation to interventions.
supported_claims: Random assignment reduces systematic baseline differences between treatment groups.

cases.query: What is the value of preregistration in empirical research?
expected_insights: Preregistration records hypotheses and analysis plans before observing study outcomes.
Preregistration reduces undisclosed flexibility in analysis and interpretation.

trusted_sources.title: Preregistration Revolution
trusted_sources.snippet: Preregistration distinguishes planned confirmatory tests from exploratory analysis.
supported_claims: Preregistration records hypotheses and analysis plans before observing study outcomes.
Preregistration reduces undisclosed flexibility in analysis and interpretation.

cases.query: Summarize how systematic reviews differ from narrative reviews.
expected_insights: Systematic reviews use explicit eligibility criteria and reproducible search methods.

trusted_sources.snippet: Systematic reviews follow predefined methods to identify and synthesize evidence.
supported_claims: Systematic reviews use explicit eligibility criteria and reproducible search methods.
Narrative reviews are typically less protocol-driven and more dependent on author selection.

cases.query: Explain Bayes theorem using medical test interpretation.
expected_insights: Bayes theorem updates prior probability using the likelihood of observed evidence.

trusted_sources.snippet: Bayesian updating combines prior probabilities with evidence likelihoods.

cases.query: What factors contributed to the reproducibility crisis in psychology?

expected_citations.title: Estimating the Reproducibility of Psychological Science

expected_insights: Selective reporting and flexible analysis choices can inflate apparent findings.
Large replication projects found that many psychology results were weaker in replication.

trusted_sources.title: Estimating the Reproducibility of Psychological Science
trusted_sources.snippet: Replication studies assessed reproducibility of published psychological science.
supported_claims: Selective reporting and flexible analysis choices can inflate apparent findings.

cases.query: Describe the privacy guarantee provided by differential privacy.

expected_citations.title: The Algorithmic Foundations of Differential Privacy

trusted_sources.snippet: Differential privacy formalizes the effect of one person's data on algorithmic outputs.
supported_claims: Differential privacy limits how much one individual's data can change an output distribution.

cases.query: Summarize the main privacy benefit of federated learning.

trusted_sources.snippet: Federated optimization trains models from decentralized data stored on client devices.
supported_claims: Federated learning trains models across decentralized clients without centralizing raw local data.
